title: newnpc-light-fix-addon
description: This addon fixes broken and inconsistent lighting in the NewNPC mod. It corrects shading, removes harsh dark spots, and restores proper light interaction on NPC models. The result is cleaner visuals, smoother gradients, and accurate brightness in all envir
body:
**English:**
As of May 10, 2026, I recommend switching to the new plugin [KastNPC](https://modrinth.com/mod/kastnpc) (1.21.4) — more features, etc.

**Russian:**
Начиная с 10.05.2026, рекомендую переходить на новый плагин [KastNPC](https://modrinth.com/mod/kastnpc) (1.21.4) — больше функций и т.д.

newnpc-light-fix-addon

This addon fixes broken and inconsistent lighting in the NewNPC mod. It
corrects shading, removes harsh dark spots, and restores proper light
interaction on NPC models. The result is cleaner visuals, smoother
gradients, and accurate brightness in all environments.

Fully compatible with NewNPC. No gameplay changes — visuals only.

newnpc-light-fix-addon

after
